# Breadcrumb

A navigation breadcrumb component for displaying the user's current location within a page hierarchy. Supports both a convenience API and composable sub-components.

## Import

```jsx
import { Breadcrumb } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

The Breadcrumb component uses a nested property pattern. All sub-components are accessed as properties of the main Breadcrumb component.

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Breadcrumb` | Convenience root that automatically wraps children in items with separators |
| `Breadcrumb.Root` | Low-level root container for full manual control |
| `Breadcrumb.List` | Ordered list container for breadcrumb items |
| `Breadcrumb.Item` | Individual breadcrumb item wrapper |
| `Breadcrumb.Link` | Clickable link within a breadcrumb |
| `Breadcrumb.CurrentLink` | Non-clickable link representing the current page |
| `Breadcrumb.Separator` | Visual separator between breadcrumb items |
| `Breadcrumb.Ellipsis` | Ellipsis indicator for truncated breadcrumbs |

## Props

### Breadcrumb (Convenience Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the breadcrumb |
| `variant` | `"plain" \| "underline"` | `"plain"` | The visual style variant |
| `separator` | `React.ReactNode` | `"/"` | Custom separator element between items |
| `separatorGap` | `string` | - | Gap spacing between items and separators |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### BreadcrumbLink

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `href` | `string` | - | The URL to link to |

## Usage

### Basic (convenience API)

```jsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/">Home</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/products">Products</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>Shoes</Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>
</Breadcrumb>
```

### With custom separator

```jsx
<Breadcrumb separator=">">
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/">Home</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/settings">Settings</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>Profile</Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>
</Breadcrumb>
```

### With ellipsis (truncated)

```jsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/">Home</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.Ellipsis />
  <Breadcrumb.Link href="/category/subcategory">Subcategory</Breadcrumb.Link>
  <Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>Current Page</Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>
</Breadcrumb>
```

### Full manual control

```jsx
<Breadcrumb.Root>
  <Breadcrumb.List>
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.Link href="/">Home</Breadcrumb.Link>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
    <Breadcrumb.Separator />
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.Link href="/docs">Docs</Breadcrumb.Link>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
    <Breadcrumb.Separator />
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>API</Breadcrumb.CurrentLink>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
  </Breadcrumb.List>
</Breadcrumb.Root>
```

## Features

- Convenience `Breadcrumb` root automatically wraps children with items and separators
- Low-level sub-components available for full layout control via nested properties
- `Breadcrumb.CurrentLink` indicates the current page (non-interactive)
- `Breadcrumb.Ellipsis` for truncating long breadcrumb trails
- Custom separator support
- Renders semantic `<nav>` and `<ol>` elements for accessibility
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
- Clean nested property pattern for better discoverability and type safety
